content:
|   No. | Operation sequence                                                                                                             | Sample code                                                                                   |
|------:|:-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|:----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|
|     1 | :ref:`Initialize and Release Camera Remote SDK<op-initialize-and-release-camera-remote-sdk>`                                   | :ref:`sample "connect"<sample-connect>`                                                       |
|     2 | :ref:`Enumerate Cameras<op-enumerate-cameras>`                                                                                 | :ref:`sample "connect"<sample-connect>`                                                       |
|     3 | :ref:`Create a "Camera Object" with information known in advance<op-create-camera-object-with-information-known-in-advance>`   | :ref:`sample "CreateCameraObjectInfo"<sample-CreateCameraObjectInfo>`                         |
|     4 | :ref:`Connect a Camera<op-connect-a-camera>`                                                                                   | :ref:`sample "connect"<sample-connect>`                                                       |
|     5 | :ref:`Disconnect a Camera<op-disconnect-a-camera>`                                                                             | :ref:`sample "connect"<sample-connect>`                                                       |
|     6 | :ref:`Changes in Camera Remote SDK connection status<op-changes-in-sdk-connection-status>`                                     | :ref:`sample "connect"<sample-connect>`                                                       |
|     7 | :ref:`Connect/Disconnect multiple cameras<op-connect-disconnect-multiple-cameras>`                                             | :ref:`sample "connect to multi-camera"<sample-connectMulti>`                                  |
|     8 | :ref:`Get the Camera Properties<op-get-the-camera-properties>`                                                                 | :ref:`sample "get/set device property, send command"<sample-getSetDeviceProperty>`            |
|     9 | :ref:`Get the Live View Properties<op-get-the-liveview-properties>`                                                            |                                                                                               |
|    10 | :ref:`Device Properties and Live View Properties<op-device-properties-and-liveview-properties>`                                | :ref:`sample "get/set device property, send command"<sample-getSetDeviceProperty>`            |
|    11 | :ref:`Change the Camera Properties<op-change-the-camera-properties>`                                                           | :ref:`sample "get/set device property, send command"<sample-getSetDeviceProperty>`            |
|    12 | :ref:`Send a Control Command<op-send-a-control-command>`                                                                       | :ref:`sample "get/set device property, send command"<sample-getSetDeviceProperty>`            |
|    13 | :ref:`Get a Live View Image<op-get-a-liveview-image>`                                                                          | | :ref:`sample 'get Live view and OSD image'<sample-getLiveViewAndOSD>`                       |
|       |                                                                                                                                | | :ref:`sample 'get Live view and OSD image with http'<sample-getLiveViewAndOSDhttp>`         |
|    14 | :ref:`Capture an Image Sequence<op-capture-an-image-sequence>`                                                                 | :ref:`sample "AF Shooting"<sample-afShooting>`                                                |
|    15 | :ref:`Change the Store Image Folder and the File Name <op-change-the-store-image-folder-and-the-filename>`                     | :ref:`sample "connect"<sample-connect>`                                                       |
|    16 | :ref:`Get the menu display string<op-get-the-menu-display-string>`                                                             | see "execute_xx_displaystringlist" of RemoteCli app.                                          |
|    17 | :ref:`Pull out content stored on media in ContentsTransferMode<op-pull-out-content-stored-on-media-in-contents-transfer-mode>` | :ref:`sample "Pull out content in ContentsTransferMode"<sample-ContentsTransferMode>`         |
|    18 | :ref:`Pull out content stored on media in RemoteTransferMode<op-pull-out-content-stored-on-media-in-remote-transfer-mode>`     | :ref:`sample "Pull/delete/playback content in RemoteTransferMode"<sample-RemoteTransferMode>` |
|    19 | :ref:`Get the MediaProfile<op-get-the-media-profile>`                                                                          | :ref:`sample "control FTP Job"<sample-controlFTPJob>`                                         |
|    20 | :ref:`SDK Properties<op-sdk-properties>`                                                                                       |                                                                                               |
|    21 | :ref:`Download and upload setting files<op-download-and-upload-setting-files>`                                                 | :ref:`sample "Download and upload setting files"<sample-downloadUploadSettingFile>`           |
|    22 | :ref:`Control the FTP Jobs<op-control-the-ftp-jobs>`                                                                           | :ref:`sample "control FTP Job"<sample-controlFTPJob>`                                         |
|    23 | FTP Server Setting                                                                                                             | :ref:`sample "FTPServerSetting"<sample-FTPServerSetting>`                                     |
|    24 | :ref:`Control Monitoring<op-control-monitoring>`                                                                               | :ref:`sample "control Monitoring"<sample-monitoring>`                                         |
|    25 | :ref:`Memorize Zoom Distance and Focal Distance<op-memorize-zoom-distance-and-focal-distance>`                                 | see "execute_xx_zoom_and_focus_preset" of RemoteCli app.                                      |
|    26 | :ref:`Get OSD(On-Screen Display) Image<op-get-osd-on-screen-display-image>`                                                    | | :ref:`sample 'get Live view and OSD image'<sample-getLiveViewAndOSD>`                       |
|       |                                                                                                                                | | :ref:`sample 'get Live view and OSD image with http'<sample-getLiveViewAndOSDhttp>`         |
|    27 | :ref:`Movie Playback<op-movie-playback>`                                                                                       | :ref:`sample "Pull/delete/playback content in RemoteTransferMode"<sample-RemoteTransferMode>` |
|    28 | :ref:`Remote Firmware Update<op-remote-firmware-update>`                                                                       | see "xx_firmware" of RemoteCli app.                                                           |
|    29 | :ref:`How to use LensInformation<op-how-to-use-lens-information>`                                                              | :ref:`sample "get LensInformation"<sample-getLensInformation>`                                |
|    30 | :ref:`Control Pan/Tilt<op-control-pan-tilt>`                                                                                   | see "control_ptzf_xx" of RemoteCli app.                                                       |
|    31 | :ref:`Create/Clear Preset PTZF<op-create-clear-ptzf-preset>`                                                                   | see "xx_ptzf_preset" of RemoteCli app.                                                        |
|    32 | :ref:`Set/Get the TimeZone Setting<op-timezone-setting>`                                                                       | see "xx_timezone_setting" of RemoteCli app.                                                   |
|    33 | :ref:`Delete Contents from Media by Contents Transfer with remote control mode<op-delete-contents-remote-transfer>`            | :ref:`sample "Pull/delete/playback content in RemoteTransferMode"<sample-RemoteTransferMode>` |
|    34 | upload CustomGridLine                                                                                                          | :ref:`sample "upload CustomGridLine"<sample-CustomGridLine>`                                  |
|    35 | :ref:`Set Eframing<op-set-eframing>`                                                                                           | :ref:`sample "set Eframing"<sample-Eframing>`                                                 |
